author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 18faf09. GUIDE.md (9 task walkthroughs incl. agent JSON + pipelines + safety model), FAQ.md (8 entries answering the design's real questions — literal-by-default rationale, the CLI-replacement-\n-is-literal gotcha discovered while dogfooding #102, exit codes, lock sentinel rationale, encoding policy + non-goals, undo internals w/ honest large-file cost, crate naming, --confirm interactivity), README comparison table vs sed/sd that concedes the rows ripsed loses (hold space, giant files) and links BENCHMARKS.md. Claims spot-checked against the built binary before committing. No code changes.
